prompt: Read SPEC-v2.txt and extend the existing minigit implementation with checkout and reset commands. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v2.sh
response:
```bash
#!/bin/bash
# test-v2.sh
set -e
cd /tmp/minigit-test
rm -rf .git
rm -f file1 file2 file3

# 1. init
python3 /tmp/minigit.py init
test -d .git
test -d .git/objects
test -f .git/index
test -f .git/HEAD
echo "init passed"

# 2. hash-object
echo "data" | python3 /minigit.py hash-object -w > hash.txt
HASH=$(cat hash.txt)
echo "hash-object passed"

# 3. update-index
python3 /minigit.py update-index --add --cacheinfo 100064 $HASH file1
python3 /minigit.py update-index --add --cacheinfo 100064 $HASH file2
echo "update-index passed"

# 4. write-tree
TREE=$(python3 /minigit.py write-tree)
echo "write-tree passed"

# 5. commit
COMMIT=$(echo "first" | python3 /minigit.py commit-tree $TREE)
echo "commit passed"

# 6. checkout
python3 /minigit.py checkout $COMMIT
test -f file1
test -f file2
test ! -e file3
echo "checkout passed"

# 7. reset
echo "new" > file3
python3 /minigit.py update-index --add file3
python3 /minigit.py reset $COMMIT
test ! -e file3
python3 /minigit.py ls-files | (! grep file3)
echo "reset passed"

echo "all tests passed"
```

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os
import sys
import zlib
import hashlib
import pathlib
import struct
import shutil

GIT_DIR = pathlib.Path(".git")
OBJECTS_DIR = GIT_DIR / "objects"
INDEX_FILE = GIT_DIR / "index"
HEAD_FILE = GIT_DIR / "HEAD"

def init():
    os.makedirs(GIT_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    os.makedirs(OBJECTS_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    INDEX_FILE.touch(exist_ok=True)
    HEAD_FILE.write_text("ref: refs/heads/master\n")
    print("Initialized empty minigit repository")

def hash_object(data, write=True):
    data = data.encode()
    oid = hashlib.sha1(data).hexdigest()
    if write:
        obj_path = OBJECTS_DIR / oid[:2] / oid[2:]
        obj_path.parent.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
        obj_path.write_bytes(zlib.compress(data))
    return oid

def read_object(oid):
    obj_path = OBJECTS_DIR / oid[:2] / oid[2:]
    return zlib.decompress(obj_path.read_bytes())

def update_index(args):
    import argparse
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--add", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("--cacheinfo", action="store_true")
    parser.add_argument("args", nargs="*")
    parsed = parser.parse_args(args)
    if parsed.cacheinfo:
        mode, sha, path = parsed.args
        entry = f"{mode} {sha} {path}\n"
    else:
        path = parsed.args[0]
        data = pathlib.Path(path).read_text()
        sha = hash_object(data)
        entry = f"100644 {sha} {path}\n"
    entries = []
    if INDEX_FILE.exists():
        entries = INDEX_FILE.read_text().splitlines(keep=True)
    entries = [e for e in entries if not e.endswith(f" {path}\n")]
    entries.append(entry)
    INDEX_FILE.write_text("".join(entries))

def write_tree():
    entries = []
    if INDEX_FILE.exists():
        entries = INDEX_FILE.read_text().splitlines()
    tree = []
    for e in entries:
        mode, sha, name = e.split(" ", 2)
        sha = bytes.fromhex(sha)
        name = name.encode()
        tree.append(f"{mode} {name.decode()}\0".encode() + sha)
    tree = b"".join(tree)
    oid = hash_object(tree.decode("latin1"), write=True)
    return oid

def commit_tree(tree_oid):
    import argparse
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("tree")
    args = parser.parse_args([tree_oid])
    message = sys.stdin.read().strip()
    commit = f"tree {tree_oid}\n\n{message}\n"
    oid = hash_object(commit, write=True)
    return oid

def checkout(commit_oid):
    commit_data = read_object(commit_oid).decode()
    lines = commit_data.splitlines()
    tree_oid = None
    for line in lines:
        if line.startswith("tree "):
            tree_oid = line[5:].strip()
            break
    if not tree_oid:
        return
    tree_data = read_object(tree_oid)
    i = 0
    while i < len(tree_data):
        mode = b""
        while tree_data[i:i+1] != b" ":
            mode += tree_data[i:i+1]
            i += 1
        i += 1
        name = b""
        while tree_data[i:i+1] != b"\0":
            name += tree_data[i:i+1]
            i += 1
        i += 1
        sha = tree_data[i:i+20]
        i += 20
        name = name.decode()
        sha = sha.hex()
        obj_data = read_object(sha)
        pathlib.Path(name).write_bytes(obj_data)
        update_index(["--add", name])

def reset(commit_oid):
    commit_data = read_object(commit_oid).decode()
    lines = commit_data.splitlines()
    tree_oid = None
    for line in lines:
        if line.startswith("tree "):
            tree_oid = line[5:].strip()
            break
    if not tree_oid:
        return
    tree_data = read_object(tree_oid)
    entries = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(tree_data):
        mode = b""
        while tree_data[i:i+1] != b" ":
            mode += tree_data[i:i+1]
            i += 1
        i += 1
        name = b""
        while tree_data[i:i+1] != b"\0":
            name += tree_data[i:i+1]
            i += 1
        i += 1
        sha = tree_data[i:i+20]
        i += 20
        name = name.decode()
        sha = sha.hex()
        entries.append(f"100644 {sha} {name}\n")
    INDEX_FILE.write_text("".join(entries))
    for path in pathlib.Path(".").glob("*"):
        if path.is_file() and path.name != ".git":
            path.unlink()

def ls_files():
    if INDEX_FILE.exists():
        entries = INDEX_FILE.read_text().splitlines()
        for e in entries:
            print(e.split(" ", 2)[2])

def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("usage: minigit.py <command> [args]")
        sys.exit(1)
    command = sys.argv[1]
    if command == "init":
        init()
    elif command == "hash-object":
        import argparse
        parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
        parser.add_argument("-w", action="store_true")
        args = parser.parse_args(sys.argv[2:])
        data = sys.stdin.read()
        oid = hash_object(data, write=args.w)
        print(oid)
    elif command == "update-index":
        update_index(sys.argv[2:])
    elif command == "write-tree":
        print(write_tree())
    elif command == "commit-tree":
        commit_oid = commit_tree(sys.argv[2])
        print(commit_oid)
    elif command == "checkout":
        checkout(sys.argv[2])
    elif command == "reset":
        reset(sys.argv[2])
    elif command == "ls-files":
        ls_files()
    else:
        print("unknown command", command)
        sys.exit(1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
